scripts.dev:sidecar: cd apps/scrape-server && uv run uvicorn main:app --port 8765 --reload
scripts.cli:lint: cd apps/novstash-cli && UV_NO_SYNC=1 NOVSTASH_DB=../../local.db uv run ruff check src/
scripts.cli:format: cd apps/novstash-cli && UV_NO_SYNC=1 NOVSTASH_DB=../../local.db uv run ruff format src/
scripts.cli:test: cd apps/novstash-cli && UV_NO_SYNC=1 NOVSTASH_DB=../../local.db uv run pytest -v
scripts.cli:download: cd apps/novstash-cli && NOVSTASH_DB=../../local.db uv run python -m novstash scrape
scripts.cli:list: cd apps/novstash-cli && NOVSTASH_DB=../../local.db uv run python -m novstash list-novels
scripts.cli:info: cd apps/novstash-cli && NOVSTASH_DB=../../local.db uv run python -m novstash info
